overview: Industrial factory monitoring dashboard for real-time conveyor-based object detection and counting. Features a simulated live camera feed with bounding boxes, large metric displays, control buttons, and a historical analytics chart. Built for factory-floor visibility with a dark, minimal industrial design.
features: Live camera feed simulation with bounding boxes and object IDs
ROI (Region of Interest) line with detection highlight
Large Total Count and real-time metrics panel
Line graph for historical performance analytics
Dark industrial theme with green/red accents
